message:
feat(runtime): implement multi-database SELECT and SWAPDB acceptance

SELECT now accepts DB indices 0-15 (matching Redis's default 16 databases)
instead of rejecting everything except DB 0. SWAPDB accepts valid DB pairs.

Both commands are now runtime-special commands with proper error messages:
- Non-integer args: "ERR value is not an integer or out of range"
- Out-of-range DB: "ERR DB index is out of range"

Note: all databases currently share a single Store namespace. Full per-DB
isolation requires architectural changes tracked separately.

Updated conformance fixtures to accept SELECT 1 and SWAPDB 0 1 as valid.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
